zh.Youlston, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文尤爾斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Beaumont於大約1448年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Thomas Beaumont48歲，母親Alice Stukeley22歲。他於1475年與Thomasine Wise在英國戴文維爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1507年3月25日在英國英格蘭戴文維爾享年60歲。

zh-hans.Youlston, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文尤爾斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Beaumont于大约1448年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Thomas Beaumont48岁，母亲Alice Stukeley22岁。他于1475年与Thomasine Wise在英国戴文維爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1507年3月25日在英国英格兰戴文維爾享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Beaumont was born about 1448, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Beaumont, was 48 and his mother, Alice Stukeley, was 22. He married Thomasine Wise in 1475, in Shirwell, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 25 March 1507, in Shirwell, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Beaumont est né environ 1448, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Beaumont, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alice Stukeley, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Thomasine Wise en 1475, à Shirwell, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 mars 1507, à Shirwell, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Beaumont um 1448 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Beaumont 48 und seine Mutter Alice Stukeley 22. Er hat 1475 in Shirwell, Devon, England Thomasine Wise geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. März 1507 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Shirwell, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Beaumont è nato il circa 1448 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Beaumont, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Alice Stukeley, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Thomasine Wise nel 1475, nel Shirwell, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 25 marzo 1507, nel Shirwell, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Beaumontが約1448年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Thomas Beaumontは48歳，母Alice Stukeleyは22歳であった。1475年にイギリスデボンシュイルウエルでThomasine Wiseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1507年3月25日にイギリスイギリスデボンシュイルウエルで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Beaumont(이)가 대략 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Beaumont(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Stukeley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1475년 영국 데폰 실웰에서 Thomasine Wise(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1507년 3월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 실웰에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1448, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Beaumont, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Alice Stukeley, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Thomasine Wise em 1475, em Shirwell, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de março de 1507, em Shirwell, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Beaumont родился около 1448 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Beaumont было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Stukeley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasine Wise в 1475 г. в местности ширвелл, девон, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 25 марта 1507 г. в местности ширвелл, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Beaumont nació aproximadamente 1448, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Beaumont, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Alice Stukeley, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Thomasine Wise en 1475, en Shirwell, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1507, en Shirwell, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
